'''Alabash''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] on the edge of the [[Fakir sector/Legends|Fakir sector]]. Located in the [[Alabash system/Legends|Alabash system]], it was a [[Volcano/Legends|volcanic]] planet.

==History==
Alabash was a young [[Volcano/Legends|volcanic]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] covered in [[Magma/Legends|lava]] rivers and with large deposits of [[alantium]]. Shortly after the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] [[Spy/Legends|spies]] embedded in the [[Imperial Resource Procurement Bureau]] discovered that the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire]] was processing six hundred [[Metric ton/Legends|metric tons]] of alantium per [[Standard month/Legends|month]] from the planet. Alantium was an important component in the construction of [[Starship/Legends|starship]] hulls, but the volatile nature of Alabash made mining expensive. The Empire countered by deploying an automated [[Imperial mining complex|mobile mining complex]], staffed by [[Droid/Legends|droids]] and commanded by a [[Terreene Brainiac]] class artificial intelligence known as [[Control (droid)|Control]]. [[Green squad]], a unit under the Alliance's [[Reekeene's Roughnecks]] command, was tasked with infiltrating and destroying the base.<ref name="Freedom" />
